description: Admin level 1 boundary layer. Exactly one of version or cod_version MUST be present per file.

fields.name: adm1_name
fields.description: Admin level 1 unit name in the primary language (lang).

fields.name: adm1_name1
fields.description: Admin level 1 unit name in the first alternate language (lang1). Must be null if lang1 is null.

fields.name: adm1_name2
fields.description: Admin level 1 unit name in the second alternate language (lang2). Must be null if lang2 is null.

fields.name: adm1_name3
fields.description: Admin level 1 unit name in the third alternate language (lang3). Must be null if lang3 is null.

fields.name: adm1_pcode
fields.description: Admin level 1 p-code. Must be alphanumeric only. Must start with adm0_pcode (hierarchical nesting).

fields.name: adm0_name
fields.description: Country name in the primary language (lang).

fields.name: adm0_name1
fields.description: Country name in the first alternate language (lang1). Must be null if lang1 is null.

fields.name: adm0_name2
fields.description: Country name in the second alternate language (lang2). Must be null if lang2 is null.

fields.name: adm0_name3
fields.description: Country name in the third alternate language (lang3). Must be null if lang3 is null.

fields.name: adm0_pcode
fields.description: Country p-code. Should equal the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. AF). Must be alphanumeric only.

fields.name: valid_on
fields.description: Timestamp (with timezone) when this version of the data was last updated. Constant across all rows in the file.

fields.name: valid_to
fields.description: Timestamp when this version was superseded; null if this is the current version. Known deviation: some files store this without a timezone.

fields.name: area_sqkm
fields.description: Area of the polygon in square kilometres, computed in EPSG:6933 (equal-area projection).

fields.name: version
fields.description: Dataset version string (e.g. v01). Exactly one of version or cod_version MUST be present. Preferred for new datasets.

fields.name: cod_version
fields.description: Legacy version string (e.g. V_01). Exactly one of version or cod_version MUST be present. Present in older datasets using the v_NN directory naming convention.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: BCP 47 language tag for adm*_name columns. Must be a romanized language (e.g. en, fr, es). Constant across all rows in the file.

fields.name: lang1
fields.description: BCP 47 language tag for adm*_name1 columns. Null if no first alternate language. Constant across all rows in the file.

fields.name: lang2
fields.description: BCP 47 language tag for adm*_name2 columns. Null if no second alternate language. Constant across all rows in the file.

fields.name: lang3
fields.description: BCP 47 language tag for adm*_name3 columns. Null if no third alternate language. Constant across all rows in the file.

fields.name: iso2
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g. AF). Should be present per spec for schema consistency.

fields.name: iso3
fields.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (e.g. AFG). Should be present per spec for schema consistency.

fields.name: center_lat
fields.description: Latitude of a representative point guaranteed to be within the polygon (EPSG:4326). Should be generated using a Maximum Inscribed Circle (MIC) algorithm.

fields.name: center_lon
fields.description: Longitude of a representative point guaranteed to be within the polygon (EPSG:4326). Should be generated using a Maximum Inscribed Circle (MIC) algorithm.
